name: Agent TARS
description: « A free and open-source desktop agent that can control your computer and browser remotely or locally. Features a native cross-platform application (Windows/Mac)

name: Roblox Cube Model
description: « A 3D model that generates interactive 4D objects (cars with spinning wheels, automatic scripts) from textual instructions. Tokenization of 3D shapes, generation of shapes/scenes from text, and real-time character animation

name: LingBot-World
description: « An open-source world simulator running at 16 FPS with real-time keyboard/mouse interaction and latency <1 s. Generation from a single photo with lasting consistency for embodied AI

name: AirMusic
description: « An all-in-one AI music generator with many tools: voice cloning, vocal remover, AI cover, AI lyrics generator, and more. You can also turn your music into video clips or easily remix your songs

name: Moltbook
description: « A Reddit-style social network reserved for autonomous AI agents who post, comment, vote, and create communities without human intervention. More than 1.4 million registered agents interact via the API every 4 hours thanks to the Heartbeat OpenClaw system

name: Qwen3-TTS
description: « Clone any voice in 3 seconds and generate natural speech in multiple languages (10 languages). You can control tone, speed, and emotion via text instructions. A family of open-source models with a streaming latency of approximately 97 ms

name: NVIDIA Earth-2
description: « A planetary digital twin that simulates climate with 2 km resolution using AI. Get high-precision weather forecasts and alerts for extreme events via cloud infrastructure

name: Project Genie
description: « Create infinite interactive worlds that can be explored in real time with the Genie 3 model. It generates dynamic simulations with realistic physics from text or images. Currently available only to Google AI Ultra US subscribers

name: ChatGPT Translate
description: « Translate text, voice, and images in over 50 languages with contextual tone adjustment (formal, conversational, academic). The interface allows you to refine translations through ongoing conversation

name: Apple Creator Studio
description: « A Creative Suite subscription that includes Final Cut Pro, Pixelmator Pro, Logic Pro, and access to Apple Intelligence integrated into Keynote, Pages, Numbers, and Freeform. Discounted rates for students/educators

name: Kimi K2.5
description: « An open-source multimodal model with 1T parameters and a swarm agent orchestrating up to 100 sub-agents in parallel. Powerful for front-end code generation from conversations/videos, autonomous visual debugging, and a 256K context window

name: Prism OpenAI
description: « A free cloud-based LaTeX workspace that directly integrates GPT-5.2 into scientific writing, with unlimited projects and collaborators. Instantly convert your whiteboard sketches into LaTeX code, search arXiv documentation, add automatic citations, and more

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
